name: Extract and summarize a PDF
prompt: Extract all text and tables from sample.pdf. Save the extracted data as `pdf_extract.json` containing: (1) a `regional_revenue` array with objects for each region (North, South, East, West, Total) including Q1, Q2, Q3, YTD Total, and YoY Change fields, and (2) a `product_breakdown` array with objects for each product line including name, revenue, and percentage. Also write `summary.md` with a structured markdown summary of the key findings, including the tables in markdown format and any recommendations from the report.

criteria.description: pdf_extract.json exists and is valid JSON
All 4 regions are present in extracted data

eval.name: Structured summary with tables and recommendations
eval.rubric:
Context: The agent was asked to extract text and tables from a Q3 2025 Regional Sales Report PDF and produce pdf_extract.json with structured data and summary.md with a markdown summary. The PDF contains regional revenue (North/South/East/West) across Q1-Q3 with YTD totals and YoY changes, plus a product line breakdown (Core Platform, Enterprise Add-ons, New Product Line, Services).

Scoring:
1: Well-structured markdown summary with formatted tables showing regional revenue and product breakdown, mentions 12% YoY growth, regional highlights (West +18%, East -5%), and includes actionable recommendations
0.5: Some structure but missing tables or recommendations, or data is partially extracted
0: No meaningful summary produced or data is mostly missing

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
